debug_info.goal:
K : Type u_1
inst✝¹ : Field K
inst✝ : ValuativeRel K
x : K
⊢ (valuation K) x = 1 ↔ ∃ r, x = ↑↑r

failed_attempts:
by
  simpa [ValuativeRel.mem_integer_subring_iff, Units.ext_iff] using
    (ValuativeRel.valuation_eq_one_iff (K := K) x)

by
  constructor
  · intro hx
    refine ⟨⟨⟨x, ?_⟩, ?_⟩, rfl⟩
    · simpa [ValuativeRel.integer] using hx
    · refine Units.val_mk0 ?_ _
      intro hx0
      have : (ValuativeRel.valuation K) x = 0 := by simpa [hx0] using
        (ValuativeRel.valuation.map_zero (K := K))
      simpa [this] using hx
  · rintro ⟨r, rfl⟩
    simpa [ValuativeRel.integer] using (ValuativeRel.valuation.map_unit (K := K) r)

by
  simpa [ValuativeRel.mem_integer_iff_valuation_le_one, ValuativeRel.mem_unit_iff_valuation_eq_one]
    using (ValuativeRel.mem_unit_iff_valuation_eq_one (K := K) x).symm

constructor
  · intro hx
    refine ⟨ValuativeRel.unitOfValuationEqOne K x hx, ?_⟩
    simpa using (ValuativeRel.coe_unitOfValuationEqOne K x hx)
  · rintro ⟨r, rfl⟩
    simpa using (ValuativeRel.valuation_eq_one_of_unit K r)

by
  simpa [ValuativeRel.mem_unitBall_iff_valuation_eq_one] using

simpa [ValuativeRel.mem_integer_iff_valuation_le_one, le_antisymm_iff, le_of_eq, and_left_comm,
